productDisplayName: Citizen Men Black Dial Eco-Drive Watch AW1050-01E
description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a circular stainless steel round case with a metallic bezel, stainless steel backDial style: Black dial with hour, minute and seconds hands and markingsFeatures: Date aperture, Eco-Drive technology, a screw to adjust the featuresStrap style: Black leather strap with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Citizen caseWarranty: One year international warranty and three years three months and three days warranty in India against manufacturing defects
